chat.summary: High response latency and elevated CPU

alerts.message: LLM timeout near limit on 2 requests

tickets.title: Chat response time degraded
tickets.description: Users report slow chat responses. Correlates with high CPU on chat pod.

tickets.title: Agent LLM timeout spikes
tickets.description: Intermittent LLM timeouts observed in agent monitor.

documents.title: Troubleshooting: chat response slow
documents.content:
1. Check chat pod CPU and memory in the playground namespace.
2. Verify agent health and LLM latency — slow agent calls block chat jobs.
3. Review open ITSM tickets for INC-1042.
4. If latency stays above 2s for 10 minutes, escalate to P1.

documents.title: Procedure: safe agent restart
documents.content:
1. Confirm no critical changes are in progress (check ITSM).
2. Scale agent to 0, wait 30s, scale back to 1.
3. Validate monitor shows healthy LLM calls.
4. Run a test message from chat before closing the change.

documents.title: Escalation policy P1
documents.content:
Open a P1 when user-facing chat is unavailable or latency exceeds 5s for 10+ minutes.
Notify on-call platform team and link the active ITSM incident.
